# ReconSR Contributor Copyright Assignment Agreement (CAA)

This Contributor Copyright Assignment Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between you (the "Contributor") and the ReconSR core development team (the authors: **roolsec** and **underhax**, collectively referred to as the "Authors", which term shall explicitly include any corporate entity formed by them or their successors to manage, hold intellectual property of, or commercialize the ReconSR project).

In consideration of your participation in the project and the opportunity to have your Contribution reviewed and potentially included, by submitting a Pull Request, clicking "I agree", opening or commenting on an Issue, creating or replying to a Discussion thread, or otherwise providing any code, text, or material to the ReconSR repository, you explicitly accept and agree to the following terms:

**1. Definitions**
"Contribution" means any source code, object code, patch, algorithm, tool, documentation, or other intellectual property submitted by you to the ReconSR project.

**2. Feedback**
If you provide any ideas, suggestions, bug reports, or other written feedback regarding the ReconSR project ("Feedback"), you hereby assign to the Authors all right, title, and interest in such Feedback. The Authors are free to use, implement, modify, and commercialize the Feedback without any restriction, attribution, or compensation to you.

**3. Assignment of Copyright**
You hereby unconditionally assign and transfer to the Authors the entire right, title, and interest (including all rights under copyright and related rights) in and to your Contribution. The Authors and their successors and assigns hold the exclusive, perpetual, and worldwide right to use, modify, distribute, sub-license, and commercialize the Contribution under any license terms they choose, without any compensation to you. The Authors may assign these rights to any third party without your prior notice or consent.

**4. License Back to Contributor**
The Authors hereby grant you a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, perpetual, and irrevocable license to use, reproduce, modify, and distribute your Contribution for any purpose, provided that such license does not limit, restrict, or interfere with the Authors' exclusive rights granted in Section 3.

**5. Patent Grant**
To the extent your Contribution includes patentable subject matter, you hereby grant to the Authors and their successors a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, free-of-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Contribution, alone or embedded in the ReconSR project.

**6. Waiver of Moral Rights**
To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law in your jurisdiction, you hereby permanently waive any "moral rights", rights of integrity, rights of attribution, or similar rights associated with the Contribution. You agree not to assert any such rights against the Authors or their licensees.

**7. Representations and Warranties**
You explicitly represent and warrant that:
(a) You are the sole creator of the Contribution, or you have the legal right and authority to assign the rights specified in this Agreement.
(b) The Contribution is your original work and does not infringe upon the copyrights, patents, trademarks, trade secrets, or any other intellectual property rights of any third party.
(c) If you are employed or acting as an independent contractor, your employer or client has explicitly authorized you to make this Contribution and transfer the rights, or has waived any claim to the intellectual property contained within the Contribution.
(d) The Contribution does not contain any malicious code, backdoors, or intentional vulnerabilities.
(e) You are of legal age to enter into a binding contract in your jurisdiction of residence, or you possess legal parental or guardian consent to enter into this Agreement.
(f) The Contribution does not include any third-party code (including open-source software subject to copyleft licenses) that would conflict with the rights granted to the Authors under this Agreement. If the Contribution includes AI-generated content, you represent that such content is legally assignable under this Agreement and its inclusion does not violate any third-party rights or terms of service.
(g) You are not located in, ordinarily resident in, or organized under the laws of any jurisdiction subject to comprehensive United States embargoes, nor are you subject to any U.S. sanctions (including being listed on the OFAC Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons List).

**8. Indemnification**
You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Authors, their successors, and assigns from and against any claims, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or related to any breach of your representations and warranties in this Agreement.

**9. Further Assurances**
You agree to execute and deliver such further documents and take such further actions as the Authors may reasonably request to evidence, perfect, or record the assignment and rights granted under this Agreement.

**10. Electronic Signature Consent**
You acknowledge and agree that clicking the "I agree" button (or similar mechanism) via the CLA Assistant or GitHub interface constitutes a legally binding electronic signature equivalent to a handwritten signature.

**11. No Employment Relationship**
This Agreement does not create an employer-employee relationship, partnership, agency, or joint venture between you and the Authors. Your Contribution is provided on a strictly voluntary basis.

**12. Data Privacy**
You consent to the collection, processing, and retention of your personal data (including GitHub username, email address, and IP address) by the Authors or third-party systems (e.g., CLA Assistant) strictly for the purpose of maintaining legal records of this Agreement in compliance with applicable laws.

**13. Trademarks**
This Agreement does not grant you the right to use any trademarks, trade names, service marks, or logos of the ReconSR project or the Authors without the prior written consent of the Authors. You may not claim any endorsement, partnership, or affiliation with the Authors or the ReconSR project without such explicit written permission.

**14. Miscellaneous**
This Agreement constitutes the entire legal agreement between the parties regarding the Contribution. Sections 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 11, 12, and 13 shall survive any termination or expiration of this Agreement. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, USA, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any legal action or proceeding arising under this Agreement shall be brought exclusively in the state or federal courts located in the State of Delaware. If any provision of this Agreement is found to be unenforceable or invalid by a court of competent jurisdiction, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
